articles.title: Ecolab Looks to Raise About $4 Billion to Fund CoolIT Takeover
articles.summary: Ecolab Inc. is seeking to sell around $4 billion of investment-grade bonds to help finance its acquisition of CoolIT Systems Inc., according to people familiar with the matter.

articles.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Angst
articles.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concern over accelerating inflation fuels a selloff across global debt markets.

articles.title: La Caisse Arm Buys Database Firm ISC in $872 Million Deal
